Product update · UPD-002

Local Content Pack Ecosystem

Install, validate, manage, author, export, and transfer current-profile humanoid packs without application releases or JSON authoring.

TL;DR

4 promises, 12 scenarios, 24 user-can statements, 11 task flows, and 40 objective behaviors define this proposed update. Status: specified. Product-owner approval and the UPD-001 release entry condition remain.

Specified · ready for product-owner review

The specification has been derived and independently reviewed. It is not approved, implemented, or verified.

Customer promises

CP-PACK-INSTALL

A developer can inspect and install a compatible local humanoid content pack without an application release.

shared specified

CP-PACK-AUTHOR

A technical artist can turn LPC-compatible humanoid layer sheets into a reusable, token-aware, legally attributed pack without writing JSON.

shared specified

CP-PACK-LIFECYCLE

A developer can manage installed pack versions without silently changing or stranding existing projects.

shared specified

CP-PACK-PORTABILITY

A developer can move authored packs and projects that use them between web and Electron without content, rendering, or provenance drift.

cross-host specified

Why this increment

Phase 4 proves that legally traceable content can grow independently of application releases before Phase 5 adds terrain and other producers. The format remains deliberately limited to current humanoid geometry so the first ecosystem contract is extracted from working behavior rather than speculative rigs.

Task flows

IDHostCompletionStatus
TF-PACK-INSTALLsharedExact pack version is installed, offline-ready, and selectablespecified
TF-PACK-INVALIDsharedInvalid package is rejected with sources and repository unchangedspecified
TF-PACK-LIBRARYsharedDeveloper understands and controls local pack availabilityspecified
TF-PACK-UPDATEsharedVersion 2 coexists and explicit project activation is reversiblespecified
TF-PACK-REMOVEsharedOnly unused safe content removesspecified
TF-PACK-MISSING-RECOVERYsharedExact content resumes project or replacement occurs only in a copyspecified
TF-PACK-AUTHORsharedDraft previews through runtime with complete metadata and provenancespecified
TF-PACK-DRAFT-RECOVERYsharedDraft persists or fails with operable recoveryspecified
TF-PACK-VALIDATE-EXPORTsharedDeterministic pack exports and installs through public pathspecified
TF-PACK-CROSS-HOSTcross-hostPack and project round trip with exact runtime and output parityspecified
TF-PACK-OFFLINEwebPack workflows and dependent exports complete offlinespecified

Execution packages

IDEvidence gateStatus
WP-UPD002-SPECComplete update envelope, product/UX contract, engineering contract, threat model, quality scenarios, exclusions, and ready spec reviewspecified
WP-UPD002-CONTRACTSShared strict pack/draft schemas, canonical serializer, image profile, license profiles, limits, stable errors, and adversarial fixtures pass pure testsspecified
WP-UPD002-PACK-REPOSITORYWeb and Electron repository adapters pass transactional install, side-by-side version, dependency, remove, and recovery contract suitesspecified
WP-UPD002-RUNTIMEPNG-backed authored assets render through one host-neutral runtime with deterministic token replacement, frame, spritesheet, export, and credit hashesspecified
WP-UPD002-AUTHORINGDraft repository, asset import/configuration, token mapping, provenance, validation, preview, recovery, deterministic export, and self-install pass actual-UI flowsspecified
WP-UPD002-WEB-UXAll pack lifecycle and authoring flows pass production web keyboard, reflow, reduced-motion, offline, quota, and failure evidencespecified
WP-UPD002-DESKTOP-ADAPTERPackaged Electron uses opaque file grants and validated userData pack storage with no renderer path or Node authority and passes equivalent lifecycle/authoring flowsspecified
WP-UPD002-CROSS-HOSTBidirectional pack/project transfer preserves canonical payload, lock, preview, generic/Godot, and credit hashes from actual hostsspecified
WP-UPD002-REGRESSIONAll affected UPD-001 project, archive, offline, export, Electron security, and cross-host flows regress cleanly with zero severity 0-2 issuesspecified

Product-owner decisions

IDProposed decisionState
DEC-UPD002-PHASE-BOUNDARYUPD-002 opens the local humanoid content ecosystem before terrain, scenes, non-humanoids, or engine-adapter expansion.proposed
DEC-UPD002-PACK-FORMATUse one deterministic data-only .spritepack ZIP format with independent pack container, pack schema, and draft schema versions.proposed
DEC-UPD002-HUMANOID-PROFILEFormat version 1 authoring accepts exact 256x512 RGBA PNG sheets for the current 64px humanoid idle/walk four-direction layout and current six slots only.proposed
DEC-UPD002-DATA-ONLYPacks contain strict JSON, PNG, and UTF-8 text only; scripts, plugins, SVG, shaders, links, and custom decoders are rejected.proposed
DEC-UPD002-SIDE-BY-SIDEPack ID, SemVer, and payload checksum form exact identity; versions install side by side and project locks change only through explicit checkpointed action.proposed
DEC-UPD002-LICENSE-PROFILESAuthoring supports a reviewed finite license vocabulary with offered and chosen licenses plus deterministic attribution; arbitrary custom terms are excluded and the product does not provide legal advice.proposed
DEC-UPD002-ADAPTER-DEFERThe next engine adapter remains a separate update because target selection, output contract, downstream fixture, and rollback are independent of pack ecosystem delivery.proposed

Deliberate exclusions

IDExpectationDisposition
OUT-UPD002-TERRAINGenerate terrain or add a second producerPhase 5 terrain update after pack ecosystem evidence
OUT-UPD002-SCENESCompose characters and world assets in scenesPhase 5 after terrain producer is specified
OUT-UPD002-NON-HUMANOIDAuthor creatures, mounts, animals, or rider compositesLater content ecosystem update from real non-humanoid fixtures
OUT-UPD002-PIXEL-EDITORDraw or edit source pixels in the productPhase 6 manual editor
OUT-UPD002-ARBITRARY-GEOMETRYDefine custom frame sizes, layouts, directions, or animationsVersioned future pack profile after a real second geometry
OUT-UPD002-FOLDER-WATCHWatch arbitrary source or pack folders for live changesFuture desktop live-content update
OUT-UPD002-MARKETPLACEBrowse, download, publish, rate, moderate, or sell packs through a hosted catalogSeparate funded backend update
OUT-UPD002-REMOTE-INSTALLInstall a pack directly from a URLFuture distribution update after local evidence
OUT-UPD002-EXECUTABLE-PACKSRun pack scripts, plugins, shaders, SVG, or custom decodersPermanently rejected for format version 1
OUT-UPD002-ENGINE-ADAPTERAdd Unity, GameMaker, RPG Maker, or another engine adapterCandidate UPD-003 after adapter demand and target are selected
OUT-UPD002-CUSTOM-LICENSEEnter arbitrary custom license terms or receive legal clearanceExpand only through reviewed license profiles
OUT-UPD002-BULK-CONVERSIONAutomatically convert existing third-party repositories into packsFuture CLI after authoring contract is verified

Review readiness

Deep review verdict · Ready

All 14 applicable lenses score 9/10, no critical/high finding remains, and the unfamiliar-implementer gate passed after three independent rounds. Product-owner approval remains required before stabilization or implementation.

Binding detail lives in product-design-spec.md, engineering-spec.md, quality-scenarios.md, threat-model.md, release-gate.md, owner-review.md, and spec-review.json beside the canonical traceability model.
